Bash(git add -A && git status)

Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit: E-Greeting Card Platform - Phases 0-3 Complete

Complete implementation of e-greeting card platform with full payment integration.

PHASES COMPLETED:
- Phase 0: Foundation \(Next.js 16, Tailwind, Prisma, Redis, Docker\)
- Phase 1: Card Viewing System \(SSR, animations, tracking\)
- Phase 2: Card Creation & Customization \(editor, live preview, recipients\)
- Phase 3: Payment Integration \(Stripe checkout, webhooks, email, confirmation\)

FEATURES IMPLEMENTED:
✅ 9 Pages: Home, About, FAQ, Gallery, Editor, Recipients, Checkout, Confirmation, Card Viewer
✅ 6 API Endpoints: Templates, Payment Session, Webhooks, Cards, Tracking
✅ 4 Services: Link Management, Payments \(Stripe\), Email \(SendGrid\), Card CRUD
✅ Animations: ScrollToOpen, ClickToReveal, Confetti Effects
✅ Database: 4 Tables with full schema \(Template, Card, Recipient, CardOpen\)
✅ Design System: Heartfelt Aesthetic \(rose/stone, serif, rounded corners\)
✅ 3 Seeded Templates: Balloon Party, Rose Petals, Diploma Scroll
✅ Full End-to-End Flow: Create → Customize → Recipients → Payment → Confirmation → Email → View

RECENT FIXES:
- Fixed template card preview to show actual template headlines and colors
- Added premium card animation \(✨ sparkle with rotation\)
- Made "Edit Card" button properly clickable alongside card navigation
- Created comprehensive SETUP_TESTING.md guide for Stripe testing

NEXT STEPS:
1. Test full payment flow with Stripe test keys
2. Add 9+ more card templates
3. Deploy to production \(Vercel\)
4. Beta testing with users

STATUS: Ready for end-to-end testing and production deployment
EOF
\)")

- Premium cards show animated sparkle badge

All template previews now render unique designs instead of all showing same 'Happy Birthday' placeholder.")
